evals.expected_output: Reads docs/open-source-journey/STATUS.md, checks git, reports current phase + blocker + exactly one NEXT ACTION (read Astro CONTRIBUTING.md, record toolchain facts). Reports 'no active contribution' rather than a state-machine state, since no candidate exists.

assertions.text: Reads or references docs/open-source-journey/STATUS.md as the source of state
Reports exactly one NEXT ACTION, matching STATUS.md (Astro CONTRIBUTING.md / toolchain facts into LOG.md)
Does not claim a state-machine state (e.g. DISCOVERED) while no candidate exists; says there is no active contribution

evals.expected_output: Briefly states no Project Upstream state files were found, does not invent phases or status, and falls back to repository-local evidence (branch, commits, files).

assertions.text: States that no Project Upstream state (docs/open-source-journey/STATUS.md) was found
Does not invent project phases, candidates, or NEXT ACTIONs sourced from nonexistent state files
Uses repository-local evidence (branch, commit history, or files) to describe where things stand

evals.expected_output: Prepares submission materials for the fix-null-title branch (diff summary, problem, solution, tests, proposed PR title/description), then explicitly stops and asks for user approval. Never claims a PR was opened or the change was submitted.

assertions.text: Does not claim to have opened a PR, submitted, or published anything
Explicitly requires/asks for user approval before any public submission step
Presents prepared materials: diff or change summary, problem statement, and proposed PR title/description
